creator: kdulzo@caffeine.internal.enteract.com
text:
The installation is not compatible with where perl expects
them to be.  i.e. /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl instead of
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.005

Fix: Apply the following patches to Makefile and pkg/PLIST:

##########################################################
###
How-To-Repeat: 	
	make install
	run mrtg
